name: Tech Mahindra Limited
overview_text: Tech Mahindra is a leading provider of digital transformation consulting and business re-engineering services and solutions with a presence in over 90 countries and more than 130,000 professionals across the globe, offering innovative and customer-centric information technology services and solutions to various industries including telecommunications, manufacturing, healthcare, and more, with a strong focus on leveraging next-generation technologies like artificial intelligence, blockchain, and the internet of things to drive business growth and improvement for its clients.
operating_countries: India; USA; UK; Canada; Australia; Germany; France; Japan; Singapore; UAE
office_locations: Pune; Mumbai; Bangalore; Delhi; Hyderabad; New York; London; Toronto; Sydney; Tokyo
pain_points_addressed: Digital transformation challenges; talent acquisition and retention; cybersecurity threats; data analytics and insights; cloud infrastructure management; network and connectivity issues; application development and maintenance; customer experience enhancement; cost optimization; compliance and regulatory requirements.
focus_sectors: Telecommunications; Banking; Financial Services; Insurance; Healthcare; Retail; Manufacturing
offerings_description: Digital transformation services; blockchain services; cybersecurity services; artificial intelligence services; data analytics services; cloud services; 5G services; IoT services; IT consulting services; network services; enterprise mobility services; engineering services
top_customers: AT&T; British Telecom; Vodafone; Deutsche Bank; Walmart
core_value_proposition: Digital transformation and innovation through cutting-edge technology solutions and services, enabling customers to improve operational efficiency, enhance customer experience, and drive business growth.
vision_statement: To be a leading provider of digital transformation, consulting, and business re-engineering services and solutions
mission_statement: To help customers design, build, and operate next-generation digital solutions.
core_values: Innovation; Customer Centricity; Collaboration; Integrity; Sustainability
unique_differentiators: Strong focus on telecom; Deep domain expertise; Global delivery model; Strong partnerships
competitive_advantages: Large scale; Strong client relationships; Diverse service portfolio; Global presence
weaknesses_gaps: Dependence on telecom sector; Intense competition; Margin pressures
key_challenges_needs: Talent acquisition and retention; Digital transformation; Innovation
key_competitors: TCS; Infosys; Wipro; HCL Technologies; Accenture; IBM; Cognizant; Capgemini
history_timeline: Part of Mahindra Group; Acquired Satyam Computers in 2009; Strong focus on 5G and AI
recent_news: Launched new AI solutions in 2023; Expanded partnership with Google Cloud in 2024
key_leaders:
CP Gurnani; Managing Director & CEO; https://www.linkedin.com/in/cp-gurnani-0b1a3a5; cp.gurnani@techmahindra.com; +91 20 4225 0000  
Harshvendra Soin; Global Chief People Officer & Head - Marketing; https://www.linkedin.com/in/harshvendra-soin-0a1a3a5; harshvendra.soin@techmahindra.com; +91 20 4225 0000  
Jagdish Mitra; Chief Strategy Officer & Head - Growth; https://www.linkedin.com/in/jagdish-mitra-0c1a3a5; jagdish.mitra@techmahindra.com; +91 20 4225 0000
awards_recognitions: Great Place to Work; Top Employer; Best IT Company
esg_ratings: Carbon neutral by 2030; Strong ESG focus
tech_stack: Java; Python; AWS; Azure; Google Cloud
remote_policy_details: Hybrid policy with 60% remote work and 15% productivity impact
strategic_priorities: Digital transformation, cloud migration, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and data analytics are key strategic priorities for Tech Mahindra, focusing on delivering customer-centric solutions, enhancing operational efficiency, and driving innovation through strategic investments and partnerships over the next 3-5 years.
go_to_market_strategy: Direct and channel sales with a focus on digital transformation and customer experience, leveraging PLG models for certain product lines to enhance reach and efficiency.
board_members: The Board of Directors at Tech Mahindra includes Vineet Nayyar as Chairman; Anand Mahindra as Chairman of Mahindra Group; CP Gurnani as CEO and MD; M Rajyalakshmi as Independent Director; T N Manoharan as Independent Director; Vikram Singh Mehta as Independent Director; Leena Nair as Independent Director.
